item.title: Blog test
item.description: Testing blog with a first post

item.title: Pain! pain!! pain!!!
item.description: successfully wired up hugo theme to my specific need. Some rework was necessary but not without the pain

item.title: First blog
item.description: Finally overcame my “Fear Of NOt Missing Out” (FONOMO) of having my own page
WIP - Projects – Things I’ve built, tested, or experimented with. - Tutorials – How or better way to do stuffs. - Articles – Lots of nice to know.

item.title: About me
item.description: I’m an IT engineer with a passion for solving problems and staying curious about how technology shapes the world around us. When I’m not learning a new framework, testing out a new gadget, or discovering a hidden corner of the world, you’ll usually find me outdoors hiking trails, or planning my next travel adventure. I’ve always believed that the best ideas come when you step away from the screen. Whether I’m hiking through the Scottish countryside, exploring new cities, or experimenting with the latest gadgets, I’m driven by the same instinct: to learn, explore, and understand how things work.
